code: import React,{createContext,useState,useContext,useEffect}from'react';import AsyncStorage from'@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';import{Colors as DarkColors}from'../constants/Colors';import{LightColors}from'../constants/LightColors';import{useAppInfo}from'./AppInfoContext';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const THEME_STORAGE_KEY='app_theme';const ThemeContext=createContext({theme:'dark',colors:DarkColors,setTheme:async()=>{},toggleTheme:async()=>{}});export const useTheme=()=>useContext(ThemeContext);export function ThemeProvider({children}){const[theme,setThemeState]=useState('dark');const[colors,setColors]=useState(DarkColors);const{themeColor}=useAppInfo();useEffect(()=>{loadStoredTheme();},[]);useEffect(()=>{applyTheme(theme,themeColor);},[theme,themeColor]);const loadStoredTheme=async()=>{try{const storedTheme=await AsyncStorage.getItem(THEME_STORAGE_KEY);if(storedTheme&&(storedTheme==='light'||storedTheme==='dark')){await setTheme(storedTheme);}}catch(error){console.error('Error loading stored theme:',error);}};const applyTheme=(mode,color)=>{const base=mode==='light'?LightColors:DarkColors;setColors(Object.assign({},base,{gold:color,interactive:Object.assign({},base.interactive,{primary:color,primaryHover:color}),tabBar:Object.assign({},base.tabBar,{active:color}),border:Object.assign({},base.border,{focus:color})}));};const setTheme=async newTheme=>{try{setThemeState(newTheme);applyTheme(newTheme,themeColor);await AsyncStorage.setItem(THEME_STORAGE_KEY,newTheme);}catch(error){console.error('Error setting theme:',error);}};const toggleTheme=async()=>{const newTheme=theme==='light'?'dark':'light';await setTheme(newTheme);};return _jsx(ThemeContext.Provider,{value:{theme,colors,setTheme,toggleTheme},children:children});}
